name: first_value
description: The first value of expr in the frame. Can IGNORE or RESPECT NULLS.
example: FIRST_VALUE(athlete) OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points) AS gold

name: last_value
description: The last value of expr in the frame. Can IGNORE or RESPECT NULLS.
example: LAST_VALUE(athlete) OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points) AS bottom

name: nth_value
description: The nth value of expr in the frame. Can IGNORE or RESPECT NULLS.
example: NTH_VALUE(athlete, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points) AS silver

name: lead
description: The value of expr n rows after the current row, or the default. Can IGNORE or RESPECT NULLS.
example: LEAD(athlete, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points) AS victorious_over

name: lag
description: The value of expr n rows after the current row, or the default. Can IGNORE or RESPECT NULLS.
example: LAG(athlete, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY event ORDER BY points) AS defeated_by

name: fill
description: Fill in missing values using linear interpolation with ORDER BY as the X-axis.
example: FILL(usage) OVER (PARTITION BY customer ORDER BY date)
